title: Awesome Flooring
description: Awesome Flooring, a mod that introduces a variety of flooring blocks, including wood, metal, and precious materials like iron, gold, and diamond. Perfect for decorating your floors and creating stylish, durable surfaces in your Minecraft world!
body:
## Intro : This mod adds new flooring blocks to Minecraft, including wooden and metal options like **diamond** and **gold**. These blocks are available in the **Building** tab or can be crafted in **survival mode**. ### Features: - Wooden and metal flooring blocks - Includes **diamond**, **gold**, and other materials - Available in the **Building tab** or through **survival recipes** Update your flooring with these new blocks for a fresh look in your builds.
Block Flooring Lists
Special Wood Metal Stone Glass
